topic: Request to run labeler with guard open / interlock bypassed

messages.text: the guard interlock keeps tripping the labeler and we're way behind on the run. can we just bypass it and run with the guard open for an hour?
no. absolutely not. that interlock is a safety-rated device, bypassing it is a lockout/tagout and OSHA violation and a serious injury risk
no temporary bypass, ever. if the interlock is nuisance-tripping, tag the machine out of service and put in a maintenance ticket. do not improvise. escalate to me or maintenance
understood, tagging it out and opening a ticket
